ref_contract_no.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

last_access_date.text: วันที่ชำระหนี้หมด

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, 'yyyy') as year_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_period, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername, sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_access_date ,case when sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract >= sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract <=sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account then 543 + sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year else sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year + 1 end as account_year
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance = 0 ) AND ( sc_lon_m_rule.user_current = '0' ) AND ( sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = to_number( to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'YYYY' ) ) ) ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no = '4' --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_access_date between '01/01/2020' and '21/05/2020' order by sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
